action.reasoning: Observation: Ensemble of best.pt + v3.pt got new best 0.6686. Have 2.4h, 12 iters. Squirrel (0.26), bird (0.31) still weak. Analysis: Ensembles with diverse models help. Train one more diverse model (different seed, different config) and ensemble all 3. Try seed=3 with slightly different settings (e.g., 8 epochs, img_size=252) to add diversity. Also could try logit adjustment but risky. Decision: Train v4 with seed=3, 8 epochs, save to checkpoints/v4.pt, then submit ensemble of best.pt + v3.pt + v4.pt.
action.command: SEED=3 EPOCHS=8 IMG_SIZE=252 SAVE_PATH=checkpoints/v4.pt python train.py
